tabs.shell.label: Shell
settings.bash.enabled.label: Bash
settings.bash.enabled.description: Enable the bash tool for shell command execution
settings.bash.autoBackground.enabled.des: Automatically background long-running bash commands and deliver the result later
settings.bashInterceptor.enabled.label: Bash Interceptor
settings.bashInterceptor.enabled.descrip: Block shell commands that have dedicated tools
settings.bash.stripTrailingHeadTail.desc: Silently drop trailing `| head`/`| tail` pipes from single-line bash commands. Output is already truncated automatically.
settings.shellMinimizer.enabled.label: Shell Minimizer
settings.shellMinimizer.enabled.descript: Compress verbose shell output (git, npm, cargo, etc.) before returning it to the agent
settings.shellMinimizer.sourceOutlineLev: Source outline mode for cat/read of source files: default or aggressive
settings.eval.py.label: Python Eval Backend
settings.eval.py.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch Python cells to the IPython kernel
settings.eval.js.label: JavaScript Eval Backend
settings.eval.js.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch JavaScript cells to the in-process runtime
settings.eval.rb.label: Ruby Eval Backend
settings.eval.rb.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch Ruby cells to the persistent Ruby kernel
settings.eval.jl.label: Julia Eval Backend
settings.eval.jl.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch Julia cells to the persistent Julia kernel
settings.python.kernelMode.label: Python Kernel Mode
settings.python.kernelMode.description: Keep the IPython kernel alive across eval calls or start fresh each time
settings.python.interpreter.label: Python Interpreter
settings.python.interpreter.description: Optional path to an exact Python executable. When set, automatic Python runtime discovery is skipped.
settings.ruby.interpreter.label: Ruby Interpreter
settings.ruby.interpreter.description: Optional path to an exact Ruby executable. When set, automatic Ruby runtime discovery is skipped.
settings.julia.interpreter.label: Julia Interpreter
settings.julia.interpreter.description: Optional path to an exact Julia executable. When set, automatic Julia runtime discovery is skipped.
